Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Izyrians]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Izyrians are reverting to old ways and using blood-sport in arenas.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Izyrians consider themselves separate from the Erinin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Aurelian general fought against the Izyrians.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Yala infiltrated the Izyrians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Izyrians rule the Izyrians.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — The arena seats were filled with grubby Izyrians.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Izyrians are a group that could revolt if Alagaeus is the Regent.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The ancient Izyrians called Loreli 'Sunblood' after she pierced the side of Urg’naut and light spilled out.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
